family10_rule_workflow.contract: One fixed representative base_geometry per geometry family. All variants only change auxiliary overlays.

levels.B: many conservative witnesses on the same base
levels.B+: many roleful auxiliary-face constructions on the same base
levels.B++: many two-layer projection, hinge, section, or multi-face interaction constructions on the same base
levels.B+++: many dense multi-face, perpendicular-style projection, transfer-lattice, stacked-relation, or extra-point web constructions on the same base

family10_rule_workflow.generation: deterministic rule templates enumerated across orientations; no model call

variants.exam_note: 截面不只画面，也显式标出截面中心和两条面内对角线。

variants.name: B++01 · 二面角中剖
variants.focus: dihedral hinge plus median section
variants.exam_note: 把侧面二面角和穿过棱锥的中剖面同时摆出来。

variants.name: B++01 · 二面角垂直切片
variants.focus: dihedral hinge with perpendicular-style slice and side faces
variants.exam_note: 相邻侧面、底面和穿过顶点的垂直切片一起出现。

variants.name: B+++01 · 双截面轴格
variants.focus: two same-ratio sections and diagonal transfer planes
variants.exam_note: 比 B++ 多一层同向截面和中心轴转移，但仍然是规则点。

variants.name: B+++01 · 相邻面投影链
variants.focus: adjacent side faces with center and perpendicular-style projection chain
variants.exam_note: 两张相邻侧面、中截面、底面和顶点投影链同时互动。

variants.name: B+++01 · 密集相邻面点网
variants.focus: dense adjacent side-face and section point web
variants.exam_note: 在二面角相邻面链上加两处截面中点和投影脚连接，形成更密的可读辅助点组。
